location.name: Main
location.description: You are standing in a small country town. This Pallet Town, where you live. Route 1 is to the NORTH and the ocean is to the SOUTH. OAK has a lab here. You can rest at HOME.

location.name: Sea
location.description: You can't swim in the ocean. You're 10 years old!

location.name: Home
location.description: You have rested and are now ready to continue.

location.name: pCenter
location.description: Your pokémon are all at full health now.

location.name: Route 1
location.description: Route 1 is a calm country road full of greenery. You can SEARCH for pokémon, TALK to others on this route, travel SOUTH to Pallet Town, or travel NORTH to Veridian City.

location.name: Rt1Man
location.description: There is a promoter here for the Poké Mart in Veridian City, north of here. They gave you a free potion!

location.name: Rt1No1
location.description: The Poké Mart promoter reminded you to visit the Poké Mart in Veridian City.

location.name: Veri City
location.description: Veridian City is a small city that is enveloped in green year-round. Route 1 is to the SOUTH, Route 2 is to the NORTH, and Route 22 is to the WEST. You can heal your party at the Pokémon CENTER or visit the Poké Mart SHOP.

location.name: MartV1
location.description: The clerk at the Poké Mart knows you are from Pallet Town and gave an important parcel. You need to deliver it to Professor Oak.

location.name: MartV2
location.description: The clerk at the Poké Mart reminded you to deliver that important parcel to Professor Oak.

location.name: Route 2
location.description: Your path is blocked by an old man complaining about coffee or something.

location.name: Route 22
location.description: Route 22 is a paved road that leads straight to the Pokémon League. You can SEARCH for pokémon, travel EAST to Veridian City, or travel WEST to visit the Pokémon League.

location.name: League
location.description: The League guard cannot let you in until you have a badge from each town's pokémon gym.

location.name: Help
location.description: The choices that you may make on each screen will be presented in capital letters. In most cases, you may type BACK to return the previous location. You may also type RESTART to start over and QUIT to end the game.
